title: Technical Analysis Indicator Seeds
description: Seed catalog of OHLC-based technical analysis indicators with shared timestamp, interval, optional symbol, and optional fetched date-range inputs.

data.name: sma
data.title: Simple Moving Average
data.description: Arithmetic mean of the selected price field over a rolling window ending at the requested timestamp or fetched date-range boundary.

concept.definition: Arithmetic mean of the selected price field over a rolling window ending at the requested timestamp or fetched date-range boundary.

symbol.description: Optional instrument symbol for the supplied time series.

interval.description: Bar interval used by the supplied OHLC series or the fetched market-data series.

start_date.description: Inclusive lower-bound bar timestamp used when fetching OHLC bars from an upstream time-series pulser.

end_date.description: Inclusive upper-bound bar timestamp used when fetching OHLC bars from an upstream time-series pulser and as the default series cutoff when timestamp is omitted.

timestamp.description: Upper-bound bar timestamp for the returned indicator series. Optional when end_date is provided.

ohlc_series.description: Ordered OHLC bar series sorted ascending by timestamp. Optional when symbol, interval, start_date, and end_date are provided.

values.description: Simple Moving Average time series up to and including the requested timestamp.

timestamp.description: Indicator point timestamp derived from the source OHLC bar.

value.description: Simple Moving Average value at the timestamp.

derivation.notes: Compute the indicator time series from the supplied OHLC series or fetch an OHLC series from the upstream market-data pulser when symbol, interval, start_date, and end_date are provided.

data.title: Exponential Moving Average

symbol.description: Optional instrument symbol for the supplied time series.

end_date.description: Inclusive upper-bound bar timestamp used when fetching OHLC bars from an upstream time-series pulser and as the default series cutoff when timestamp is omitted.

timestamp.description: Upper-bound bar timestamp for the returned indicator series. Optional when end_date is provided.

ohlc_series.description: Ordered OHLC bar series sorted ascending by timestamp. Optional when symbol, interval, start_date, and end_date are provided.

values.description: Exponential Moving Average time series up to and including the requested timestamp.

timestamp.description: Indicator point timestamp derived from the source OHLC bar.

value.description: Exponential Moving Average value at the timestamp.

derivation.notes: Compute the indicator time series from the supplied OHLC series or fetch an OHLC series from the upstream market-data pulser when symbol, interval, start_date, and end_date are provided.

data.name: keltner_percent_b
data.title: Keltner %B
data.description: Relative position of the selected price field within a Keltner channel defined by EMA and ATR windows.

concept.definition: Relative position of the selected price field within a Keltner channel defined by EMA and ATR windows.

symbol.description: Optional instrument symbol for the supplied time series.

interval.description: Bar interval used by the supplied OHLC series or the fetched market-data series.

end_date.description: Inclusive upper-bound bar timestamp used when fetching OHLC bars from an upstream time-series pulser and as the default series cutoff when timestamp is omitted.

timestamp.description: Upper-bound bar timestamp for the returned indicator series. Optional when end_date is provided.

ohlc_series.description: Ordered OHLC bar series sorted ascending by timestamp. Optional when symbol, interval, start_date, and end_date are provided.
